deactivate.title: Danger zone
deactivate.description: Deactivate your account. You have 30 days to change your mind before it is permanently deleted.

dialog.title: Deactivate your account?
dialog.description: Your account will be disabled immediately and permanently deleted in 30 days. You can cancel the deletion by signing back in within the grace window.
dialog.acknowledgeLabel: I understand my account will be deleted after the grace period.

deactivated.title: Your account is deactivated
deactivated.subtitle: All features are paused while your account is scheduled for deletion.
deactivated.reactivatePrompt: Changed your mind? Restore your account with one click.
